places.name: The Raven Room
places.description: Edgar Allan Poe's old dorm is now a shrine to the author's legacy.

places.name: Monticello's Vegetable Garden and Fruitery
places.description: Thomas Jefferson's estate is home to hundreds of varieties of historic fruits and vegetables.

places.name: University of Virginia’s Hidden Chemical Hearth
places.description: Hidden for 165 years inside a building designed by Thomas Jefferson are the remains of what may be America's first educational chemistry lab.

places.name: University of Virginia's Seven Society
places.description: The story behind the mysterious symbol painted in front of the historic university's famous Rotunda.

places.name: Headstone of Anna Anderson
places.description: Anna Anderson spent most of her life claiming to be the lost Romanov child Anastasia.

places.name: Kluge-Ruhe Aboriginal Art Collection of the University of Virginia
places.description: The only museum outside of Australia dedicated to exhibiting the artwork of Indigenous Australian artists.

places.name: Ix Art Park
places.description: An abandoned textile mill that is now home to art and concerts.
